case_title: EDUARDO CABANAYAN ET AL VS. THE AMERICAN AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION OF NORTHERN CA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE AMERICAN AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION OF NORTHERN CA THE AMERICAN AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION OF NOTHERN CAIFORNIA, NV., & UTAH
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY CABANAYAN, EDUARDO CABANAYAN, KATHLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT THE AMERICAN AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION OF NORTHERN CA THE AMERICAN AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION OF NOTHERN CAIFORNIA, NV., & UTAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT THE AMERICAN AUTOMOBILE ASSOCAITION OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY EDWARD LOWELS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
